title: Chunkumulator
description: Optimizes chunk sending for worse quality connections to the server, allowing them to start playing as soon as they join.
body:
# Chunkumulator

Optimizes chunk sending for worse quality connections to the server, allowing them to start playing as soon as they join.

[Example Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e7oQEg0cKG8)

Known Incompatibilities:

- C2ME
